checkpoints.details: Refreshed main after PR #99 merged, confirmed that #101 and #102 remain open with residual follow-up scope, and kept #14 in manual follow-up.
Applied the remaining Scurry squeak changes onto the local integration branch and committed 44a0c7f.
Applied the remaining Palette-Rat touch-target and overlay-dismissal changes onto the local integration branch and committed 4a9f430.
Passed the-lab-website build locally and passed 9 Playwright tests in the Playwright Docker image after local pnpm execution hit a root-owned test-results permission issue.
